prestazioni: AMG M139 2.0L Inline-4 engine: Full Pankl connecting rods with ARP 2000 rod bolts and custom-forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.0:1 compression) for 38 psi boost capability, paired with a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (84mm billet compressor wheel, 106mm turbine, .96 A/R turbine housing) and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate with custom 3.5" v-band downpipe

Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ transmission upgrade with billet 300M input shaft, upgraded synchros (triple-cone 1st/2nd, double-cone 3rd/4th), and a PUK Racing 8-piston 400mm front brake kit with 380mm rear rotors (2-piece floating design, J-Hook slots, and Pagid RS29 pads)

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 80mm of travel, monotube design) with custom valving for the A45 S chassis, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars (adjustable end links) and Ohlins TTX40 MkII dampers for track use (remote reservoirs, 24-click rebound, 22-click compression)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (pre-preg carbon fiber, 50mm front/60mm rear fender flares) with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon fiber weave on the roof and mirror caps

AMG Performance Studio carbon fiber front splitter (extended 50mm with integrated canards) and custom 3D-printed rear diffuser (dual-layer design, 3" diffuser tunnels, and integrated exhaust cutouts for the Weistec 4.5" titanium exhaust system)
BBS LM-R 19x9.5" ET25 front and 19x11" ET35 rear wheels (custom offset for 265/30/19 and 295/25/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires) with HRE FlowForm FF03 center locks and titanium hardware
